Seam.rationale: boundary in all three — the predicted pivot

Syntax.rationale: internal form, internal rule, internally checkable

Structure.rationale: internal arrangement, internal hold, perceived at the boundary

System.rationale: interior whole, interior dynamics, known from outside by behavior

Scope.rationale: interior extent, delimited at the boundary, read inside

Sequence.rationale: interior order whose steps cross and show at the boundary

Subject.rationale: an interior that acts at its boundary and is addressed from outside

Save.rationale: interior store reaching out to capture, result kept inside

Seat.rationale: interior rest that supports outward, shown at the boundary

Source.rationale: interior origin, emits outward, known by its output

Selection.rationale: a boundary gate whose criterion and outcome are interior

Site.rationale: a bounded place holding interior dynamics, met at its edge

Shape.rationale: boundary form, internally caused, externally read

Span.rationale: boundary-to-boundary stretch, read as interior extent

Surface.rationale: boundary, acting as boundary, read from outside

Sink.rationale: boundary that pulls the exterior inward

Stream.rationale: boundary flow, outward-driving, read in passage

Signal.rationale: boundary crossing, outward act, read outside

Substrate.rationale: lies beyond/beneath the unit, carries interiors, read inward

Standard.rationale: external norm, binds interiors, applied at the boundary

Space.rationale: the ambient: exterior seat, met at every boundary

Semantics.rationale: exterior reference, negotiated at the boundary, lands as interior meaning

Scale.rationale: relation to the ambient, measured at boundary, read outside

Sensor.rationale: faces the exterior, acts on it by sampling, delivers inward

Switch.rationale: exterior-facing actuator, state shown at the boundary

State.rationale: the condition as the outside sees, probes, and reads it
